Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants a process tree representing a complex hospital patient management scenario The tree must use specific operators sequence XOR parallel loop leafs activities or tau

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process Description into Steps Nodes go through each numbered step and map it to the operators Step Arrival A Registration RG Intake Assessment IA This is a strict sequence Step Triage Interview TI Triage Classification TC sequence Step Exclusive choice between CE and FBP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: This is a loop The loop condition is if results are abnormal loop commences The loop structure A is executed then either you exit the loop or you execute B and then A again call the loop body LoopBody SC X TM SPT RDT X FCE FBA B tau Loop tau LoopBody tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: combine all steps into the main sequence Step -> Step -> Step -> Step -> Step -> Step -> Step root sequence children Step sequence A RG IA Step sequence TI TC Step X CE FBP Step loop Step parallel AI NC Step sequence FAS DDI Step parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: verify against the prompts definitions check Step loop definition A executed then exit or B then A again tau works Step Advanced Imaging AI Nutritional Counseling NC true concurrency Step final concurrency BL ICP MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Python construction plan root ProcessTree operator SEQUENCE build each step seq1 SEQUENCE parent root A RG IA seq2 TI TC xor1 CE FBP loop body SEQUENCE SC xor TM SPT RDT xor FCE FBA loop LOOP body tau parallel AI NC seq FAS DDI parallel BL ICP MRF set parents append children

Name: Validation - PE
Text: verify the tree structure matches the description exactly Step sequence correct Step sequence correct Step XOR correct Step loop body correct Step parallel correct Step sequence correct Step parallel correct All connected in sequence at root correct

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self Correction Verification during thought double check the loop operator definition A executed then exit or B then A again tau perfect check step descriptions all match Final review all steps covered textual representation matches
